prompt: The current kiro-autofix-trigger.yml workflow uses an inline prompt built with printf statements in a shell script. Refactor the 'Process queue' step to instead invoke a custom agent config using 'kiro-cli --agent autofix chat --no-interactive --trust-all-tools' with a minimal positional prompt. The diagnostics context should be passed via the KIRO_DIAGNOSTICS_FILE environment variable instead of being cat'd into the prompt. Keep the queue loop structure, commit logic, and all safety checks intact. Produce the complete package: refactored workflow step, agent config, and system prompt.
assertions: The refactored step uses 'kiro-cli --agent autofix chat --no-interactive --trust-all-tools' command syntax
Diagnostics context is passed via KIRO_DIAGNOSTICS_FILE environment variable (not inlined in the prompt)
The positional prompt is minimal: references artifact name and queue position only
Commit logic preserved (git add -A, status check, commit with message file or fallback)
KIRO_COMMIT_MSG_FILE environment variable is still set for each artifact
The queue loop structure (while read artifact) is preserved
Truncation logic for oversized diagnostics is preserved
A companion agent config JSON file is produced with correct matcher: fs_write hook
A companion system prompt markdown file documents the env vars (KIRO_DIAGNOSTICS_FILE, KIRO_COMMIT_MSG_FILE, etc.)
